cards.back: The largest land animal. They can weigh up to 6,000 kg!
Dolphins sleep with one eye open and one half of their brain awake.
A giraffe's tongue can be up to 50 cm long!
Penguins can't fly, but they are excellent swimmers.
Bees communicate by dancing! It's called the waggle dance.
A star at the center of our solar system. It is about 4.6 billion years old.
Known for its beautiful rings made of ice and rock.
Called the Red Planet because of iron oxide on its surface.
Earth's only natural satellite. It takes 27.3 days to orbit Earth.
The farthest planet from the Sun. It has the strongest winds in the solar system.
Very, very big! Example: The elephant was enormous.
Wanting to learn or know something. Example: The curious cat explored the box.
Not afraid of danger. Example: The brave firefighter saved the kitten.
Extremely beautiful or impressive. Example: The sunset was magnificent.
Continuing to try even when things are hard. Example: Her perseverance helped her win.
